docket_entries.description: OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-30-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTER JOHNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTER DAVID $619.78 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $647.78, ($419.78+$200 DAMAGES)PLTF TO PERMIT DAVID JOHN, AGENT FOR DEFT TO VEFIFY THE FOLLOWING: STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER DAVID HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PORTER JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
